description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners, finished in a glossy red color. The front features a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display with a black bezel and a prominent notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is a solid red with a reflective surface, displaying a centered black Apple logo and dual vertically-aligned camera lenses in the top left corner, accompanied by a small flash. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal, with visible buttons for volume and power control. The device is compact and lightweight, typical of contemporary mobile phones, and is designed for handheld use. The overall appearance is premium, with attention to detail in the finish and component placement.
description: A glossy red smartphone with a large touchscreen, black Apple logo on the back, and dual rear cameras. The device has a premium, modern design with slim metal sides and visible control buttons.
description_view_0: The left edge of the phone, showing its slim profile and subtle button outlines.
description_view_1: The back of the phone, featuring a glossy red finish, black Apple logo, and dual cameras in the top left corner.
description_view_2: The right edge of the phone, highlighting its thinness and the placement of side buttons.
description_view_3: The front of the phone, displaying the large touchscreen with app icons, a notch at the top, and minimal bezels.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, glossy and reflective against the red surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a typical iOS home screen with app icons such as Messages, Calendar, Photos, Camera, Weather, Maps, Clock, and others. The wallpaper shows a blue-toned forest landscape. The time is visible in the top left, and the notch contains the front camera and sensors.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small flash module.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the left edge (volume up, volume down, and mute switch) and on the right edge (power button). The buttons are slim and elongated.
